calendar.matters:
Petition For Allowance Of Extraordinary Commissions
Off Calendar Nov-20-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Amy Shelf appearing for executor. Court questioned the amount of extraordinary fees. Counsel explained the work was done prior to the property being transferred to the trust for sale. Matter granted. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Floyd Butler, CSR#2518. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petition For Allowance Of Extraordinary Commissions
Off Calendar Nov-06-2006 Continued To Nov-20-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
